candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over synonymous Net Sales because it explicitly states total revenue.
Also a valid top-line revenue label and numerically identical to Total Revenue in the preview; useful as fallback if labeling changes by year.
Expense line, not revenue.
COGS-type total, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Loss of revenue due to covid-19
candidates.why: Specific adjustment item, not total revenue.

variables.notes: Priority list for revenue line across years; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Best direct COGS/cost of sales line; populated and matches Cost of Revenues - Total numerically.
Related direct cost line, but appears to exclude some amortization/depreciation in some years and is less complete than Cost of sales.
Also a valid COGS total and numerically identical to Cost of sales; Cost of sales is simpler/preferred.

candidates.row_label: Amortization in Cost of Goods and Services
candidates.why: Component of COGS but should not be chosen over the main direct cost line.

candidates.row_label: Impairment of Intangibles in Cost of Goods and Services
candidates.why: Specific impairment component, not the standard COGS line.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Cost of Goods and Services
candidates.why: Specific depreciation component, not the main COGS line.

variables.notes: Selected the clearest direct cost line; avoided duplicate total row and excluded D&A/impairment subcomponents.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component covering selling/marketing.
Related SG&A label, but appears only sparsely and overlaps with Selling and marketing expenses.
Clear SG&A overhead component covering administrative overhead.
Related SG&A label, but appears to be an alternate/partial version and overlaps with General and administrative expenses.
Headcount metric from balance sheet, not an income statement expense row.
Headcount metric from balance sheet, not an income statement expense row.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A total row is present. Selected the two best overhead component rows and excluded overlapping alternate labels, totals, D&A, impairments, and other non-operating items.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense; XRD should be research and development expense.

variables.notes: No clear current-period research & development expense line is present in the provided statements. The only candidate is an amortization supplemental line, which should not be used for XRD.

candidates.why: Best direct interest expense line.
Net interest line can serve as fallback when the direct interest expense line is unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Only a lease-interest subcomponent, not total interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list: prefer direct interest expense; use the net interest balancing line only as fallback if the direct line is missing in a year.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the Parent company
candidates.why: Income statement profit attribution line, not a balance sheet equity stock measure.
Semantically the best owner/parent equity label, but it appears largely unpopulated and not reliable across the preview.
Main balance sheet equity line and numerically matches Total Equity in the preview.
Also a valid total equity line and numerically identical to Equity; Equity is slightly simpler as primary.
Balancing/subtotal line, not appropriate when actual equity rows exist.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Assets/liabilities total, not equity.

variables.notes: No robust parent-only equity line is available across years. Selected the main equity line and identical fallback total equity line. A separate non-controlling interest line exists but is zero in the preview, reducing double-counting concern.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not the balance sheet minority interest stock.
Best balance sheet line for minority/non-controlling interest.
Alternative balance sheet label for the same concept.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority interest stock.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not balance sheet minority interest.

variables.notes: Priority list for balance sheet non-controlling interest/minority interest. Preview indicates zero when present.
